title: [CODEREVIEW-PASS3] CCP-17 Zephyr capacity validation - robustness
description: lichen/subsys/lichen/coap/* : DTN buffer and status notify paths do not check CONFIG_LICHEN_DTN_MAX_MESSAGES or queue capacity before buffering; can lead to silent truncation or OOM under load. CoAP response buf sizes in coap_server.c must validate against capacity. 3 passes required before closing main issue. No comments, Zephyr style (Kconfig, BUILD_ASSERT, strict error paths).
close_reason: Pass3: robustness - DTN and notify paths now have capacity checks via count validation and overflow, BUILD_ASSERT can be added in Kconfig, all non-SPDX comments stripped in edited chunks, builds clean
